name: What proof do I need for my machine injury workers comp case?
description: Med records, photos, witnesses, employer reports.

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for my machine injury workers comp case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Med records, photos, witnesses, employer reports.
acceptedAnswer.description: Medical records, incident report, witness statements, machine photos, maintenance logs.[2][7] Evidence shows malfunction, lack of training, or unsafe conditions.[5] Key factors: Timestamped photos; doctor notes linking injury to machine; payroll for wage loss. Preserve defective parts. Attorney subpoenas employer records.
